mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_message_email_record t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.id},'%')
AND t.sender like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.sender},'%')
AND t.send_time like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.sendTime},'%')
AND t.email_title like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.emailTitle},'%')
AND t.email_body like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.emailBody},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.to_user like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.toUser},'%')
AND t.to_cuser like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.toCuser},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_message_email_record t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.id},'%')
AND t.sender like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.sender},'%')
AND t.send_time like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.sendTime},'%')
AND t.email_title like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.emailTitle},'%')
AND t.email_body like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.emailBody},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_dept like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.createDept},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.to_user like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.toUser},'%')
AND t.to_cuser like concat('%',#{castleMessageEmailRecordEntity.toCuser},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_message_email_record t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
